results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Mixture of two EMAs (immediate + older) IS the dual-band high-low frequency gradient decomposition mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Dual-EMA Adam optimizer with gradients staying relevant thousands of steps IS the dual-band attenuator mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Annealing EMA + Hessian-curvature layer-wise clipping IS the phrase-level high-curvature damping mechanism.
Extended EMA perspective with time-varying LR covers schedule-based attenuation mechanism.
Variance reduction techniques survey covers EMA-based attenuation paradigm.
Hessian-based curvature-aware clipping + gradient annealing covers phrase-level curvature mute mechanism.
Cyclical thresholds covers 4-step chaal-pattern cyclical attenuation mechanism.
Adam + model EMA variance reduction covers EMA-based gradient frequency-band filtering.
